prompt: What is the most reliable immediate indicator that bag-valve-mask ventilations are effective?

Gurgling sounds only

distractorExplanations.d: Worsening cyanosis means inadequate ventilation. Learners who choose “Cyanosis becoming deeper” are usually making that exact mistake instead of applying the rule in the stem.
